name: Strawberry Shortcake Cookie
description: A cakey cookie topped with silky whipped cream, fresh chopped strawberries, and house-made strawberry jam.

name: Cinnamon Roll Cookie
description: A vanilla sugar cookie topped with cinnamon streusel and swirled with vanilla cream cheese frosting.

name: Brown Butter Chocolate Chip
description: Toasted brown butter, dark chocolate chunks, and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Our bakery's love letter to the classic.

name: Lemon Lavender Cake
description: Tender lemon cake infused with local lavender and finished with a sweet citrus glaze. Perfect for afternoon tea.

name: Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie
description: Our classic milk chocolate chip cookie — baked thick, soft, and satisfying. Always a crowd favorite.

name: Pink Sugar Cookie
description: Our signature almond sugar cookie topped with a silky pink swoop of real almond frosting.

name: Cookies & Cream Cookie
description: A warm chocolate cookie mixed with cookies & cream pieces, topped with smooth vanilla cream cheese frosting.

name: Chocolate Fudge Brownie
description: Dense, fudgy, absolutely ridiculous. Made with premium Valrhona cocoa and chocolate chunks.

name: Celebration Cake Cookie
description: A fluffy cake batter cookie with cake batter cream cheese frosting and a splash of rainbow sprinkles.

name: Snickerdoodle Cookie
description: A classic vanilla sugar cookie rolled in a sparkly cinnamon sugar coating. Warm and cozy.
